# Documentation
Autogenerated documentation for this package can be found at

[https://hackage.haskell.org/package/gi-xlib-2.0.14/docs/GI-Xlib.html](https://hackage.haskell.org/package/gi-xlib-2.0.14/docs/GI-Xlib.html)
